labels.name: Name
labels.title: Title
labels.monthPolicy: If the day is not in the month

page.title: Data & Backups
page.description: Manage local backups and prepare for sync and import/export features.

destination.title: Backup destination
destination.description: Enable backups and choose where snapshots will be stored.

backups.disabledInfo: Enable backups to configure automatic snapshots, run manual backups, and manage restore points.

warnings.missingFolder: Backups are enabled but no backup folder is configured yet.

autoBackup.title: Automatic backups
autoBackup.description: Use predefined backup cadence and retention levels for a safer setup.

manual.title: Manual backup and status
manual.description: Run backups on demand and monitor the latest execution state.

list.title: Available backups
list.description: Review generated snapshots and restore or remove items when needed.
list.empty: No backups found in the selected folder.

restoreAlert.title: Restore backup
restoreAlert.description: This will replace the local database with "{{fileName}}". Continue?

sync.title: Sync

overview.title: External folder sync
overview.description: Use a folder you already sync yourself, such as iCloud Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, Syncthing, a NAS, or a USB drive.
overview.warning: Sync uses a folder you manage outside the app. Boring Balance does not upload data to its own servers and it never runs the live database inside the sync folder.

enableHints.turnOnFirst: Turn on Enable sync first. Then choose the root folder where the app will create or find its sync files.
enableHints.ready: Sync setup is open. Choose the root folder where the app should create or find its sync files.

setup.title: Connect a sync folder
setup.description: Set up a shared sync folder in three steps: choose the root folder, then create a new sync space or connect to one that already exists.

rootFolder.title: 1. Choose a root folder
rootFolder.description: Pick an existing folder or create a new one. Boring Balance will place its own sync folder inside it.

create.title: 2. Create on the first device
create.description: Use Create when this device should publish the first sync data into that folder.

attach.title: 3. Connect on other devices
attach.description: Use Connect when another device already created the sync folder and this device should join it.

status.chooseFirst: Choose a root folder to continue.
status.exists: An existing sync space was found in this folder. Use Connect if another device already uses it.
status.missing: No sync space was found in this folder yet. Use Create if this is your first synced device.
status.repoPathPending: The app sync folder will appear here after the root folder is checked.
status.waitingForFolder: Choose a root folder to continue.

setup.actionHelp: Create starts a brand new sync space from this device. Connect joins a sync space that already exists in the selected root folder.

sync.disabledInfo: Turn on Enable sync to start setup. Then choose a root folder where Boring Balance will create or connect to its sync files.

autoSync.title: Automatic sync
autoSync.description: Choose when the app should check for remote changes and when it should publish local changes. Setting an interval to 0 turns that timer off.
autoSync.autoPushOnQuitHint: When enabled, the app publishes the latest local snapshot before it closes.

manual.title: Manual sync
manual.description: Use these buttons when you want to control sync yourself instead of waiting for the automatic timers.

tooltips.syncNow: Checks the sync folder for newer data first, then publishes this device if needed.
tooltips.pullNow: Downloads the newest sync snapshot from the shared folder when it is newer than this device.
tooltips.pushNow: Publishes this device's current data to the shared folder when local changes are newer.

hints.syncNow: Sync now runs the full safe sync flow: check remote changes first, then publish local changes if needed.
hints.pullNow: Pull now only reads from the shared folder and restores a newer snapshot to this device.
hints.pushNow: Push now only writes this device's latest snapshot to the shared folder.

status.title: Status
status.description: Review the current sync state and the most recent pull and push timestamps.

alerts.conflictHint: We kept a local copy and restored the remote snapshot.

attachAlert.title: Connect existing sync space
attachAlert.description: Connecting can replace this device's local database if the shared folder has newer data or belongs to a different sync history. Continue?

tooltips.averageDailyChangePositive: Your total net worth is increasing by an average of {{value}} per day this month (vs the end of last month).
tooltips.averageDailyChangeNegative: Your total net worth is decreasing by an average of {{value}} per day this month (vs the end of last month).
tooltips.averageDailyChangeNeutral: Your total net worth is unchanged on average per day this month (vs the end of last month).

monthlyTotals.title: Income, expenses and net cashflow
monthlyTotals.empty: No analytics data available for the selected filters.

moneyFlowSankey.title: Money flow
moneyFlowSankey.empty: No money flow data available for this month.

averageMode.label: Use elapsed months for averages
averageMode.hint: Default averages are calculated over 12 months. When enabled, averages use only January through the current month (included), and only amounts from those months.

showAllocationTargets.label: Show savings, brokerage and crypto flows
showAllocationTargets.hint: Hide these targets to focus only on incomes and expenses.

moneyFlow.empty: No money flow data available for the selected year.

compare.loadingDescription: Loading analytics for the selected months
compare.empty: No comparison data available for the selected months.

summary.title: Comparison summary
summary.description: Paired bars for income, expenses and net cashflow

radar.title: Radar comparison
radar.description: Expense categories compared across the selected months (top categories)
radar.empty: No expense categories available for radar comparison.

dailyCalendar.title: Daily expense calendar
dailyCalendar.description: Daily expense intensity with a shared scale across both months
dailyCalendar.empty: No daily expense activity available for the selected months.

expensesByCategory.title: Expenses by category
expensesByCategory.description: Category totals side by side for the selected months with delta
expensesByCategory.empty: No expense category data available for the selected months.

exclude.name: Exclude
exclude.description: Transactions excluded from analytics and budget calculations.

transfer.name: Transfer
transfer.description: Money moved between your own accounts.

add.title: Add account
add.description: Create a new account with visual settings.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the account.
errors.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 64 characters.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 50 characters.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the account.

archiveAlert.title: Archive account?
archiveAlert.description: Are you sure you want to archive "{{name}}"? After confirmation, this account will no longer be selectable for new data. Existing data with this account will continue to show it until you edit those entries.

add.title: Add category
add.description: Create a new category with visual settings and type.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the category.
errors.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 64 characters.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 50 characters.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the category.

archiveAlert.title: Archive category?
archiveAlert.description: Are you sure you want to archive "{{name}}"? After confirmation, this category will no longer be selectable for new data. Existing data with this category will continue to show it until you edit those entries.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the budget.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the budget.

deleteAlert.title: Delete budget?
deleteAlert.description: Are you sure you want to delete the budget for "{{category}}"?

analysis.title: Budget analysis
analysis.description: Compare budget targets against actual category expenses for the selected year.
analysis.empty: No budget analysis data available for {{year}}.

chart.title: Budget vs expenses by category
chart.description: Horizontal comparison of budget amount and expense total for each budget category.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the transfer.
errors.accountsMustDiffer: Source and destination accounts must be different.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the transfer.

deleteAlert.title: Delete transfer?
deleteAlert.description: Are you sure you want to delete this transfer? This action cannot be undone.

filters.title: Filter transfers
filters.description: Apply one or more optional filters to narrow the transfer list.

filters.title: Filter transactions
filters.description: Apply one or more optional filters to narrow the transaction list.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the transaction.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a valid number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the transaction.

deleteAlert.title: Delete transaction?
deleteAlert.description: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.

duplicateAlert.title: Duplicate transaction?
duplicateAlert.description: Are you sure you want to duplicate this transaction?

table.description: Manage recurring plans that generate future transactions and transfers.

schedule.monthPolicy: If the day is not in the month: {{policy}}

monthPolicy.clip: Use the last valid day of the month

add.title: Add recurring event
add.description: Create a recurring plan for a transaction or transfer. When you confirm, the scheduled items will be created immediately.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the recurring event.
errors.titleMinLength: Title must be at least 2 characters.
errors.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most 80 characters.
errors.countInvalid: Occurrences count must be a positive integer.
errors.frequencyIntervalInvalid: Frequency interval must be a positive integer.
errors.accountsMustDiffer: Source and destination accounts must be different.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

edit.title: Edit recurring event
edit.description: Update recurring plan settings. Template changes are also applied to items already created from this plan.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the recurring event.

labels.title: Title
labels.monthPolicy: If the day is not in the month

tooltips.scheduleLockedAfterCreate: After the recurring event is created, schedule settings cannot be changed.

deleteAlert.title: Delete recurring event?
deleteAlert.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"?

options.deleteLinkedItems: Also delete linked items already created by this plan
options.deleteLinkedItemsHint: This removes generated transactions/transfers connected to this recurring event.

runConfirm.title: Run recurring event?
runConfirm.description: Confirm to generate the missing scheduled items for "{{title}}" now.

updateResult.title: Recurring event updated
updateResult.description: "{{title}}" was updated successfully. Linked generated items were updated where applicable.

hints.noNewItems: No new items were created because all scheduled dates already had linked items.

runError.title: Failed to run recurring event
runError.description: The recurring event could not be executed: {{error}}

errors.loadUnexpected: Unexpected error while loading recurring events.
